name: OpenClaw Engram Memory
description: Persistent agent memory via Engram (github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram) — SQLite + FTS5 full-text search with session lifecycle, topic-based deduplication, auto-recall, and progressive disclosure

project.description: Default Engram project for memory storage

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant memories before agent execution

autoCapture.description: Automatically capture agent outputs as memories (experimental)

recallLimit.description: Maximum memories to inject during auto-recall

recallMinScore.description: Minimum normalized relevance score for auto-recall (0.0-1.0)
